'''Forre Musa''' was [[Waiter/Legends|waiter]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] in [[Zerria's Bar]] on [[Drall (planet)|Drall]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. Although he was only programmed to serve as a waiter, Musa offered patrons what he called "intelligent entertainment", ranging from political satire to poetry. Musa was a prompt waiter, even though few ever asked for his entertainment. His [[Vocabulator/Legends|voicebox]] was shot by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mirta Gev]], much to the entertainment of the other Mandalorians present and Forre's owner, a [[Dabi]].
